title: En ny dag gryer
writer: Rodney Ackland, Grete Frische, Hans Wilhelm
actors: Grethe Holmer, Jørn Jeppesen, Erling Schroeder
plot: During the summer of her graduation, young nurse Inger Holst is about to make an important decision for her adult life. Will she cave in to the smart Jørgen Frandsen, who has been hitting on her for some time - or will she go with...
